description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that includes three external CI config files from https://gitlab.com/coala/solar/common/raw/master/ci-config/base.yml, lint.yml and continuous-delivery.yml. Define the stages test, build, release, and deploy. Add a job named test:template_sync that runs in the test stage using the python:3 Docker image and executes the script command test_template_sync, with no caches, artifacts, or special rules.
